headlines.title: Kornacki Cam: Watch Steve analyze Indiana and Ohio primary results
headlines.description: NBC News chief data analyst Steve Kornacki breaks down real-time vote tallies from the Indiana and Ohio primaries, while giving viewers a behind-the-scenes look at election night coverage.

headlines.title: Republicans fret over Iowa as tough midterm races develop
headlines.description: Vice President JD Vance will visit Iowa Tuesday — a trip meant to help endangered Rep. Zach Nunn in a state where the GOP also faces issues in big races for the Senate and governor.

headlines.title: U.S. commercial ships had military security aboard during Hormuz transit, sources say
headlines.description: Two U.S. commercial ships that crossed the Strait of Hormuz on Monday had U.S. military security teams aboard as Iran launched attacks against them during the transit, according to two U.S. officials.

headlines.title: NFL star Stefon Diggs found not guilty of assaulting his live-in chef
headlines.description: A Massachusetts jury Tuesday acquitted former New England Patriots wide receiver Stefon Diggs of charges that he assaulted a live-in chef

headlines.title: Republicans propose $1 billion in taxpayer dollars to secure Trump ballroom
headlines.description: President Donald Trump portrayed the big new ballroom he’s building on White House grounds as a gift to the nation, courtesy of patriotic private donors.

headlines.title: What unsealed court documents reveal about the Lively-Baldoni legal saga
headlines.description: Newly unsealed documents in the legal battle between “It Ends With Us” co-stars Blake Lively and Justin Baldoni pull back the curtain on a monthslong courtroom clash that riveted the entertainment industry

headlines.title: Passenger Stuck on Cruise With Hantavirus Outbreak Speaks Out
headlines.description: Nearly 150 passengers, including 17 Americans, are trapped on a cruise ship off the coast of West Africa after seven possible cases of hantavirus have now been identified aboard, according to the World Health Organization. The suspected outbreak has killed at least three people and two other patients onboard the ship are being prepared for evacuation. NBC’s Camila Bernal reports for TODAY.
